On this page

Useful Links & Resources ​

A curated list of official government, regulatory, and professional portals for the financial and corporate sector in Nepal.

Regulatory Authorities

  • ICAN - Institute of CAs of Nepal
  • NRB - Nepal Rastra Bank
  • IRD - Inland Revenue Department
  • OCR - Office of Company Registrar

Government Ministries

  • Ministry of Finance (MoF)
  • Department of Industry (DoI)
  • Ministry of Industry & Commerce

Professional Bodies

  • FNCCI
  • Confederation of Nepalese Industries
  • IFAC - International Federation of Accountants

Technical Guidance

For specific interpretation of NFRS standards or Tax laws, please refer to our Insights section or Contact Our Experts.
